creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2006-12-05 20:03:55 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/antlrworks     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  ANTLRWorks is a simple but efficient IDE for ANTLR 3 grammars.
  It allows users to edit, visualize, interpret and debug
  any ANTLR 3 grammar through an easy-to-use GUI.
  
  WWW: http://www.antlr.org/works/
  
  PR:             ports/106388
  Submitted by:   Matthias Sund <m.sund at arcor.de>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2535    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +52 -0     ports/devel/antlrworks/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/antlrworks/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/devel/antlrworks/pkg-descr (new)
